case_title: DOMINIC SHANLEY VS. TED MUCKEY ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANLEY, DOMINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUCKEY, TED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1691 37TH AVENUE, GROUND FLOOR SAN FRANCISCO CA 94122 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
